Kitty Config

GPU-accelerated terminal, theme-synced via pywal.

PLANTED · 19 SEPTEMBER 2024 · ZETTEL NOTE

GPU-accelerated terminal.

File

kitty/.config/kitty/kitty.conf

Font

VictorMono Nerd Font — italics + ligatures.

Color sourcing

include ~/.cache/wal/colors-kitty.conf

Overridden after include — cursor and selection stay neon pink (#ff14c7) regardless of active palette.

  • Theme Engine
